name: Set of keys
description: There are some keys on the ground here.

name: Tasty food
description: There is food here.

name: Brass lantern
description: ${self.switchedOn ? 'Your lamp is here, gleaming brightly.' : 'There is a shiny brass lamp nearby.'}

name: Small bottle
description: There is a bottle of water here.

name: Water
description: The bottle is full of water.

name: Wicker cage
description: ${self.location === 'player' ? 'A small wicker cage.' : 'There is a small wicker cage discarded nearby.'}

name: Black rod
description: A three foot black rod with a rusty star on an end lies nearby.
secret: The rusty star on the end is magnetic and attracts small metal objects — waving it near surfaces might pull hidden items free.

name: Little bird
description: ${self.location === 'item:cage' ? 'The little bird looks unhappy in the cage.' : 'A cheerful little bird is sitting here singing.'}
secret: The bird’s song changes depending on what room it’s in — it seems to sense things about the cave that aren’t immediately obvious.

name: Velvet pillow
description: A small velvet pillow lies on the floor.

name: Giant clam
description: There is an enormous clam here with its shell tightly closed.

name: Golden chain
description: There is a golden chain lying in a heap on the floor!

name: Vending machine
description: There is a massive vending machine here.

name: Fresh batteries
description: There are fresh batteries here.

name: Pool of oil
description: There is a pool of oil here.

name: Plant
description: ${self.plantSize === 'tiny' ? 'There is a tiny little plant in the pit, murmuring "Water, water, ..."' : self.plantSize === 'tall' ? 'There is a 12-foot-tall beanstalk stretching up out of the pit, bellowing "Water!! Water!!"' : 'There is a gigantic beanstalk stretching all the way up to the hole.'}

name: Snake
description: A huge green fierce snake bars the way!

name: Dragon
description: A huge green fierce dragon bars the way!

name: Bear
description: There is a ferocious cave bear eyeing you from the far end of the room!

name: Dwarvish axe
description: There is a little axe here.

name: Troll
description: A burly troll stands by the bridge and insists you throw him a treasure before you may cross.
secret: The troll collects treasures not out of pure greed but to build something — his pile has a deliberate structure if you look closely.

name: Large gold nugget
description: There is a large sparkling nugget of gold here!

name: Several diamonds
description: There are diamonds here!

name: Bars of silver
description: There are bars of silver here!

name: Precious jewelry
description: There is precious jewelry here!

name: Rare coins
description: There are many coins here!

name: Golden eggs
description: There is a large nest here, full of golden eggs!

name: Jewel-encrusted trident
description: There is a jewel-encrusted trident here!

name: Ming vase
description: There is a delicate, precious, Ming dynasty vase here!

name: Egg-sized emerald
description: There is an emerald here the size of a plover's egg!

name: Platinum pyramid
description: There is a platinum pyramid here, 8 inches on a side!

name: Persian rug
description: There is a Persian rug spread out on the floor!

name: Treasure chest
description: The pirate's treasure chest is here!

name: Rare spices
description: There are rare spices here!
